---
title: "News"
description: >
  News and announcements from Johan Larsson: new papers, software releases,
  blog posts, talks, awards, and other updates.
listing:
  contents: "."
  sort: [date, title, desc]
  type: custom
  template: ../_templates/news.ejs
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description]
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

This page contains news and updates related to my research and activities.
